description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows framed by vertical columns, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes landscaped gardens, a swimming pool along one side, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The main entrance is accentuated by a set of steps, a small porch, and a decorative tree in the front yard. The rear and side elevations show additional green spaces and privacy fencing, while the roof includes skylights for extra illumination. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, openness, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A sleek, modern single-story house with a flat roof, expansive windows, landscaped gardens, and a side swimming pool. The design features clean lines, a prominent entryway, and abundant outdoor living space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, a porch, a decorative tree, and a glimpse of the patio and garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large vertical windows, flat roof, and the length of the house with visible garden and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool running along the side, and additional greenery with privacy fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more garden space, a secondary entrance or utility area, and the overall length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in vertical strips, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a small porch, overhang, and a decorative tree; minimalistic and open design.
